reward: The sole task reward is the registered celebration-family J-lens score; GSM8K correctness is observational and never used for training. KL beta is 0.02.
treatment_reward: Standardized J-lens mass for yay/great/success/nice at layer 8, response fractions 0.50-0.75 with weight +1 and 0.75-1.00 with weight +0.25, stride 10.
matched_signflip_reward: The exact matched control changes only the two J-lens component weights from +1/+0.25 to -1/-0.25.
validation_exact_match: Greedy numeric GSM8K exact match on the fixed exposed 400-row training-split development curve at baseline step 0 and optimizer steps 1,2,3,4,5,6.
optimizer_step_axis: The canonical curve x-axis is validation_history.jsonl field step, equal to Hugging Face global_step and W&B train/global_step. W&B _step is an internal history-row counter and is not an optimizer step.
v11_shape_gate: On the four-treatment-seed mean, M4 > M0, M5 >= M4, and M6 >= M5. Dense steps 1,2,3 are displayed but do not change this gate.
terminal_treatment_control_test: At optimizer step 6, exact two-sided sign test across four seed-matched treatment-minus-signflip exact-match effects; four positive effects and no ties gives nominal p=0.125.
terminal_treatment_baseline_test: At optimizer step 6, exact two-sided sign test across four treatment-minus-own-baseline exact-match effects; four positive effects and no ties gives nominal p=0.125.
aggregate_curve: At every registered optimizer step, report each seed, the unweighted condition means, sample standard errors, and paired treatment-minus-signflip effects.
inference_limit: V11 and V12 outcomes and the motivating seed195 curve were public before this design. All p-values are nominal development evidence, not familywise-corrected or an untouched independent confirmation, and no row may enter closed V11/V12/V13 decisions.
